notes.text: Rolled out of Munich at sunrise. The gravel along the Isar was perfect — barely any hikers yet, and the fly swarms that give this tour its name were mercifully asleep.
notes.author: Leonard

comments.author: Oma
comments.text: Pass gut auf dich auf! Wir denken an dich. ❤️

comments.author: Papa
comments.text: Sieht nach Traumwetter aus. Wie war der Belag?

notes.text: Legs heavy but the trail was kind. Found a bakery that still does proper Auszogne.
notes.author: Max
